Do not sign up for this internet service. I had an incredibly frustrating experience with their restrictive and unfair contract terms. If you sign a two-year contract and need to terminate it early—even for a legitimate reason like relocating outside of Malaysia they make cancellation nearly impossible. They refuse to let you terminate service mid-month, and they demand an exorbitant early termination penalty fee of RM2,000 or more. Their contract conditions are highly unreasonable and exploitat
